title: taraxacum cymbifolium
intro: Taraxacum cymbifolium, commonly known as the cymbiform dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly in its use as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Taraxacum cymbifolium include its ability to reduce blood pressure, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
